creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
A minor update. Bringing all Perl ports I maintain up to date and this one is just a minor bump from when I removed the POD test back in December.

How-To-Repeat: 

1: run 'make test' on 1.1.6
2:
3: See it error.
4: Try it with 1.1.7 and see that it does not.
5: Enjoy.
